name: HRH Prince Mishal Bin Sultan Bin Abdulaziz Al Saud

role.en: Chairman of the Board · Non-Executive, Investment Committee Chair
role.ar: رئيس مجلس الإدارة · غير تنفيذي، رئيس لجنة الاستثمار

oneLiner.en: Cross-sector investor (IT, investment, real estate, contracting); MPA from the London School of Economics; chairs Alamat International and directs Tharwa Holding.

role.en: Vice Chairman of the Board · Non-Executive, Investment Committee Member
role.ar: نائب رئيس مجلس الإدارة · غير تنفيذي، عضو لجنة الاستثمار

oneLiner.en: Contracting, real estate, asset-management and fintech background; EMBA (London); board seats include Halalah and Rasan (Tameeni), founding partner at Dar Wa Emaar.

name: Eng. Ghassab Bin Salman Bin Mandeel

role.en: Chief Executive Officer & Board Member · Executive
role.ar: الرئيس التنفيذي وعضو مجلس الإدارة · تنفيذي

oneLiner.en: Senior leadership across IT, e-commerce and logistics; Computer Science (King Saud University); vice chairman of Blu Store, director of Logi, chairs the Jahez Foundation trustees.

role.en: Chief Business Officer & Board Member · Executive
role.ar: رئيس قطاع الأعمال وعضو مجلس الإدارة · تنفيذي

oneLiner.en: 30+ years in logistics, e-commerce, telecom and distribution; Oxford advanced management leadership; industrial engineering (KFUPM); director at Blu Store and Logi.

role.en: Audit Committee Chair & Board Member · Independent, Investment Committee Member
role.ar: رئيسة لجنة المراجعة وعضو مجلس الإدارة · مستقلة، عضو لجنة الاستثمار

oneLiner.en: Investment banking, corporate finance and venture capital; Columbia MBA; CMA General Securities Qualification (CME-1); founder and principal partner of Chrome Advisory.

role.en: Nomination & Remuneration Committee Chair & Board Member · Independent
role.ar: رئيس لجنة الترشيحات والمكافآت وعضو مجلس الإدارة · مستقل

oneLiner.en: 25+ years across finance, industrials, real estate and healthcare; director at Riyadh Chamber and chairman of Jazeera Paints. Board membership ended 16 December 2024.

role.en: Nomination & Remuneration Committee Chair & Board Member · Independent
role.ar: رئيس لجنة الترشيحات والمكافآت وعضو مجلس الإدارة · مستقل

oneLiner.en: Investment banking, M&A and digital transformation; MSc Finance (University of Denver), Stanford Executive Program; audit committee member at Almarai, MD at TEJOURY. Joined the board 17 December 2024.
Deputy CEO since 2017; business development, project management and IT; graduate coursework at Stanford, Babson and UC Irvine; Riyadh Chamber committee member.
CFO since 2020; certified public accountant with financial control, audit and consultancy experience across car rental, IT and aviation; Harvard Senior Executive Leadership Program.
CTO since 2021; systems and application development background, including independently built food-delivery and shopping apps; software engineering (KFUPM).
COO since 2019 with distribution-sector operating experience; dual bachelor's degrees in supply chain management and accounting (Boise State University).

role.en: Internal Audit Director & Secretary of the Audit Committee
role.ar: مديرة المراجعة الداخلية وأمينة لجنة المراجعة

oneLiner.en: Internal Audit Director since 2021; audit and risk consultancy across hospitality, real estate, tourism and sports operations; MBA (Arab East Colleges).
CIO since 2022; investment management, brokerage and securities custody, plus government advisory on economic policy; MSc Finance (George Washington University).
Joined 2023; marketing, customer experience and business management across fintech, telecom and ICT; marketing (KFUPM) with Harvard executive leadership training.
Joined 2024; digital experience, e-business and innovation management across banking, IT and healthcare; MSc Knowledge & Information Systems Management (Southampton).
Joined 2024; strategy, business development and partnerships leadership across the Middle East and Africa, including CEO and MD roles; CEMS Master in International Management (Rotterdam).
